initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT t.Date, t.Amount
FROM transactions_1k t
WHERE t.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND t.Date >= '2012-01-01'
AND t.Date <= '2012-01-31';

SELECT t.Date, t.Amount
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND t.Date >= '2012-01-01'
AND t.Date <= '2012-01-31';

SELECT Date, Amount
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND Date >= '2012-01-01'
AND Date <= '2012-01-31';

SELECT t.Date, t.Amount
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND t.Date >= '2012-01-01'
AND t.Date <= '2012-01-31';

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
SELECT 
    t.Date, 
    t.Amount
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN target_customer tc ON t.CustomerID = tc.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date >= '2012-01-01' AND t.Date <= '2012-01-31';
